results.description: delta() is pure (no env reads, no file writes)
results.evidence: test_reducer_delta_is_pure_and_increments_count PASSED. Handler.delta() only performs arithmetic (state.tick_count + 1) and field assignment. No I/O in the method body.

results.description: handle() wraps delta() in dict convention
results.evidence: test_reducer_handle_returns_dict_convention PASSED — asserts output is dict with 'state' and 'intents' keys, state dict contains expected fields.
test_reducer_delta_is_pure_and_increments_count PASSED — state1.tick_count==1 after first delta, state2.tick_count==2 after second (chained state).

results.description: Reducer does NOT return envelope; RuntimeLocal constructs it in sink
results.evidence: Handler returns plain dict {'state': ..., 'intents': ...}, matching node_loop_state_reducer/handlers/handler_loop_state.py:96-110 convention. Envelope construction + persistence is OMN-8946's responsibility (verified by test_reducer_projection_persists_to_state_store).
